name: nature-workflow
description: Nature research skills packaged with lightweight workflow progress tracking.

interface.shortDescription: Use Nature research skills with simple local progress state.
interface.longDescription: Nature workflow packages the usable skills from Yuan1z0825/nature-skills, preserves shared skill dependencies, and adds a small docs/nature-workflows state system for starting, resuming, blocking, completing, and logging academic workflow tasks. Individual nature-* skills remain the primary entrypoints; the workflow tools only track local progress.
defaultPrompt: Start a Nature workflow for this paper.
Use the right nature skill for this academic task.
